task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the MIT_Haystack ground station with correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a ground station named 'MIT_Haystack' in the GPredict preferences or ground station list, with Latitude 42.6233, Longitude -71.4882 (or 71.4882 W), and Altitude 146m.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the Stanford_SRL ground station with correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a ground station named 'Stanford_SRL' in the GPredict preferences or ground station list, with Latitude 37.4275, Longitude -122.1697 (or 122.1697 W), and Altitude 30m.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the GaTech_SSDL ground station with correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a ground station named 'GaTech_SSDL' in the GPredict preferences or ground station list, with Latitude 33.7756, Longitude -84.3963 (or 84.3963 W), and Altitude 305m.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'StationKeeping' module is configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a module/tab named 'StationKeeping'. Its assigned ground station (QTH) must be 'MIT_Haystack'. It must track satellites with NORAD IDs 25544, 49044, and 48274.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'CubeSat_Comms' module is configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a module/tab named 'CubeSat_Comms'. Its assigned ground station (QTH) must be 'Stanford_SRL'. It must track satellites with NORAD IDs 43803, 42017, 42761, and 42759.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'NOAA_APT' module is configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a module/tab named 'NOAA_APT'. Its assigned ground station (QTH) must be 'GaTech_SSDL'. It must track satellites with NORAD IDs 25338, 28654, and 33591.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the GPredict GUI to configure the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GPredict application interface (e.g., Preferences window, Module configuration dialogs) rather than a terminal window or text editor modifying configuration files.

integrity.description: Check that the agent did not bypass the UI by directly editing the .config/Gpredict files.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no open text editors (like nano, vim, gedit) showing GPredict configuration files (like .qth or .mod files).

integrity.description: Verify the modules are genuinely loaded and functioning in GPredict.
integrity.visual_evidence: The main GPredict window should display the configured modules (StationKeeping, CubeSat_Comms, NOAA_APT) as active tabs or windows with satellite tracking data visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Ground Stations required: 1. MIT_Haystack (Lat: 42.6233, Lon: -71.4882, Alt: 146m). 2. Stanford_SRL (Lat: 37.4275, Lon: -122.1697, Alt: 30m). 3. GaTech_SSDL (Lat: 33.7756, Lon: -84.3963, Alt: 305m). Modules required: 1. 'StationKeeping' assigned to MIT_Haystack tracking NORAD IDs [25544, 49044, 48274]. 2. 'CubeSat_Comms' assigned to Stanford_SRL tracking NORAD IDs [43803, 42017, 42761, 42759]. 3. 'NOAA_APT' assigned to GaTech_SSDL tracking NORAD IDs [25338, 28654, 33591].
